message:
fix: ensure metadata.json has dolt server config in all worktrees (gt--srg)

Add EnsureMetadata/EnsureAllMetadata to doltserver package that writes
proper dolt server configuration (backend, dolt_mode, dolt_database) to
metadata.json files. This prevents the split-brain problem where bd falls
back to isolated local databases instead of the centralized Dolt server.

Changes:
- doltserver.EnsureMetadata: writes dolt config to a rig metadata.json
- doltserver.EnsureAllMetadata: updates all known rig databases
- InitRig now auto-updates metadata.json after init
- MigrateRigFromBeads now auto-updates metadata.json after migration
- gt dolt migrate now updates all metadata after migration completes
- gt dolt fix-metadata: new command to fix existing installs
- DoltMetadataCheck doctor check: detects missing dolt config with auto-fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
